texto: God comes right out and tells us why he gives us more money than we need. It's not so we can find more ways to spend it. It's not so we can indulge ourselves and spoil our children. It's not so we can insulate ourselves from needing God's provision. It's so we can give and give generously (2 Corinthians 8:14
explicacao: Citação de 9:11) sobre temas ligados a familia. “God comes right out and tells us why he gives us more money than we need. It's not so we can find…” articula familia, randy-alcorn, money em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como termino e money.
